backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages announcements and roster members using mutable Maps, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both entities with timestamp-based sorting for announcements.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Hero section subtitle was changed from 'Professional eSports organization' to 'Professional Esports Tournament's App' in HeroSection.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, hook, config, and asset in one or two sentences for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, border, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Legend X Esports PWA with meta tags for mobile/Apple web app support, a manifest link, service worker registration script, and profile avatar icons.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for Legend X Esports defining app name, display mode, theme/background colors, portrait orientation, and profile avatar as the app icon in both 192x192 and 512x512 sizes.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first with background-refresh strategy for GET requests, skipping cross-origin and /api/ calls, with offline fallback to index.html for navigation requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel into the full application layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, and a four-card values grid (Discipline, Excellence, Victory, Brotherhood) with esports styling.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Floating admin panel widget with tabbed UI for managing roster members and announcements, supporting add/edit/delete operations via React Query mutation hooks with loading states.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Renders a styled card for a single announcement, displaying its title, body, and formatted timestamp (converted from ICP nanoseconds) with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the brand logo, a description, social media icon links, quick navigation links, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, overlays, the Legend X Esports title, tagline, CTA buttons, and a stats row.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, desktop nav links, a 'Visit Website' CTA, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: Displays a grid of AnnouncementCards fetched via the useAnnouncements hook, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Renders a styled card for a team player showing their avatar image, name, and role badge with hover animations.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: A fixed top banner that prompts users to install the app as a PWA, handling the beforeinstallprompt event and providing iOS fallback instructions.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Renders the team roster section with loading skeletons, error, and empty states, displaying player cards in a responsive grid fetched via the useRoster hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers with custom CSS variables, esports-themed text shadows, glow effects, and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the landing page by assembling Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom esports color tokens, fonts, shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, with typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata and feature history, recording the current version and the completed feature that updated the Hero section subtitle text.
